revision.comment: created from [[Template:Location map Japan]], edit history will be saved in [[Module talk:Location map/data/Japan/doc]]
revision.text: return { name = 'Japan', x = '100*(($1>30.90)*($2-128.24)/(149.27-128.24)+($1<=30.90)*($2-110.43)/(131.44-110.43))', y = '100*(($1>30.90)*($1-45.86)/(30.02-45.86)+($1<=30.90)*($1-39.54)/(23.71-39.54))', image = 'Japan location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.svg', image1 = 'Japan natural location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.jpg', image2 = 'Japan bluemarble location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.jpg' }

revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Location map/data/Japan]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: return { name = 'Japan', x = '100*(($1>30.90)*($2-128.24)/(149.27-128.24)+($1<=30.90)*($2-110.43)/(131.44-110.43))', y = '100*(($1>30.90)*($1-45.86)/(30.02-45.86)+($1<=30.90)*($1-39.54)/(23.71-39.54))', image = 'Japan location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.svg', image1 = 'Japan natural location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.jpg', image2 = 'Japan bluemarble location map with side map of the Ryukyu Islands.jpg' }
